name: delete_utilization_results
short_description: Delete utilization results that were stored in memory under a given name.
full_help:
delete_utilization_results

Description: 
Delete utilization results that were stored in memory under a given name.

Syntax: 
delete_utilization_results  -name <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -name       Name for the set of results to clear
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Name for the set of results to clear
Suspend message limits during command execution
